description:
This quiz assesses proficiency with Regular Expressions, covering basic patterns, quantifiers, grouping, and look‑around assertions. It is moderately challenging, encouraging learners to apply and deepen their regex skills through practical matching tasks. The tone is supportive and motivational, urging continued practice to master regex.
Topics: Regular expression syntax, Quantifiers, Capturing and non‑capturing groups, Look‑ahead and look‑behind assertions, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers, QA engineers, and students with introductory to intermediate experience in JavaScript or similar languages who want to improve their regex capabilities.
